name: Oranged Cranberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a pot.
2. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
3. Cook for approximately 1 hour, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has thickened.
4. Taste and adjust sweetness as desired.
5. Ensure the sauce reaches a nice, thick consistency without overcooking.
6. Allow to cool before transferring to sterilized jars or containers.
7. Store in the refrigerator indefinitely.
Please enjoy your homemade Oranged Cranberry Sauce!
